title: GERD / Acid Reflux
subtitle: Understanding and managing gastroesophageal reflux disease
description: Clear, evidence-based information about GERD (acid reflux) — symptoms, lifestyle changes, medications, and when to seek further testing. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
